business.name: DTW Tanah Lot
business.site_title: Website Resmi Daya Tarik Wisata Tanah Lot - Tanahlot.id
business.category: Official tourism management of a sacred Hindu sea temple
business.address: Desa Beraban, Kecamatan Kediri, Kabupaten Tabanan, Bali

real_copy.hero_headline: Discover the Mystique: Tanah Lot Temple, Where Bali's Spirit Meets the Sea
real_copy.hero_subhead: Nestled amidst the majestic waves of the Indian Ocean, Tanah Lot Temple stands as an iconic emblem of Bali's spiritual and natural allure. Perched atop a rugged offshore rock formation, this ancient Hindu sanctuary captivates visitors with its dramatic silhouette against the sunset-streaked horizon.
real_copy.origin_story: Founded by Dang Hyang Dwi Jendra (Dang Hyang Nirartha) — a holy Hindu priest from the Majapahit Kingdom in East Java who traveled to Bali teaching Dharma Yatra.
real_copy.site_history: Pura Luhur Tanah Lot is located on an offshore rock in Segara Kidul Tanah Lot. The 28.58-hectare grounds include temples, housing, tourist accommodation, offices, gardens, courts, parking, rice fields, and roads.

attractions: Pura Luhur Tanah Lot (main sea temple)

palette_from_brand.source: Logo pixel analysis + Balinese Hindu cultural palette

typography.heading: Cormorant Garamond (heritage serif with cultural gravitas)

cultural_cues: Balinese Hindu sacred color: red (Brahma / devotion)
Poleng (black-white checker cloth) on shrine elements
Ular Suci (sacred sea snakes) in caves beneath the rock
Cak-cak-cak Kecak chant + firelight at sunset
